name: ds4cc
description: DS4CC Codex Marketplace meta-plugin: discover, install, and manage VeigaPunk plugins.

interface.shortDescription: Browse and install DS4CC plugins via Codex
interface.longDescription: Meta-plugin for the DS4CC personal Codex marketplace. Exposes workflows to add the marketplace, list available plugins, and install individual plugins without leaving the Codex interface.
defaultPrompt: Add the DS4CC marketplace to Codex.
